channel.title: Adam Carolla Show
channel.description: Welcome to The Adam Carolla Show, the #1 Daily Downloaded Podcast in the World. Known for his unfiltered humor, sharp insights, and candid takes on pop culture and everyday life, Adam delivers four days of uncensored comedy, in-depth interviews, and his signature rants. Each episode features a wide range of guests—from Hollywood icons to cultural commentators—joining Adam for engaging conversations and a front-row seat to his unparalleled wit. Fans love the show’s celebrity interviews, fan-favorite segments, and dynamic banter with guests like Kevin Costner, Tucker Carlson, Dr. Drew Pinsky, Danny Trejo, Adam Ray, William Shatner, and many more. Join millions of listeners worldwide for the hilarious, thought-provoking, and no-holds-barred podcast that keeps audiences coming back for more.
channel.itunes:author: PodcastOne / Carolla Digital
channel.itunes:summary: Welcome to The Adam Carolla Show, the #1 Daily Downloaded Podcast in the World. Known for his unfiltered humor, sharp insights, and candid takes on pop culture and everyday life, Adam delivers four days of uncensored comedy, in-depth interviews, and his signature rants. Each episode features a wide range of guests—from Hollywood icons to cultural commentators—joining Adam for engaging conversations and a front-row seat to his unparalleled wit. Fans love the show’s celebrity interviews, fan-favorite segments, and dynamic banter with guests like Kevin Costner, Tucker Carlson, Dr. Drew Pinsky, Danny Trejo, Adam Ray, William Shatner, and many more. Join millions of listeners worldwide for the hilarious, thought-provoking, and no-holds-barred podcast that keeps audiences coming back for more.

item.title: Adam Friedland Breaks Down His Now-Famous Interview with Gavin Newsom + FIRE & ICE: Leftist Attacks!
item.description:
Adam Friedland is a comedian, writer, and podcaster best known as the co-host of the cult comedy podcast Cum Town and the host of The Adam Friedland Show. His career has been built around his dry, self-deprecating style and satirical interviews, helping him become a prominent figure in the alternative comedy scene. Check out ‘The Adam Friedland Show’ on all platforms. 

IN THE NEWS: More leftist violence: A man with a history of anti-ICE activity carried out an arson terror attack on a federal immigration courthouse in Manhattan, Chaotic bodycam video shows trans Florida student freak out on cop for ‘misgendering’ him — before being cuffed, Democrat Harry Sisson says he wants to fight Stephen Miller, Trump's kids, or "anybody in the administration", Hulk Smashed: Mark Ruffalo Mocked For Hypocritical Attack On Elon Musk 

FOR MORE WITH ADAM FRIEDLAND:

PODCAST: The Adam Friedland Show

  • Out On All Platforms


PODCAST MINISERIES: Adam Friedland Show Presents: The Beautiful Pod

  • (Spotify) Partnered with The Ringer to Cover The World Cup 

INSTAGRAM: @adamfriedland

FOR MORE WITH ELISHA KRAUSS:

WEBSITE:  elishakrauss.com

YOUTUBE: Elisha Krauss

INSTAGRAM: @elishakrauss  

TWITTER: @elishakrauss 

LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 25 - Huntington Beach, CA
  • July 26 - Torrance, CA (2 Shows)
  • July 30 - Freehold, NJ (2 Shows)
  • July 31 - New York, NY (2 Shows)
  • August 1 - Uncasville, CT
  • August 2 - Albany, NY


Thank you for supporting our sponsors:

  • BetOnline
  • oreillyauto.com/ADAM
  • SimpliSafe.com/ADAM
  • Pluto.tv
  • PodcastOne


See Privacy Policy at https://art19.com/privacy and California Privacy Notice at https://art19.com/privacy#do-not-sell-my-info.

His career has been built around his dry, self-deprecating style and satirical interviews, helping him become a prominent figure in the alternative comedy scene. item.content:encoded:
Adam Friedland is a comedian, writer, and podcaster best known as the co-host of the cult comedy podcast Cum Town and the host of The Adam Friedland Show. His career has been built around his dry, self-deprecating style and satirical interviews, helping him become a prominent figure in the alternative comedy scene. Check out ‘The Adam Friedland Show’ on all platforms. 

IN THE NEWS: More leftist violence: A man with a history of anti-ICE activity carried out an arson terror attack on a federal immigration courthouse in Manhattan, Chaotic bodycam video shows trans Florida student freak out on cop for ‘misgendering’ him — before being cuffed, Democrat Harry Sisson says he wants to fight Stephen Miller, Trump's kids, or "anybody in the administration", Hulk Smashed: Mark Ruffalo Mocked For Hypocritical Attack On Elon Musk

item.title: John Popper on Quitting His Job and Why Taking Acid Was a “Good Life Move” + Hollywood’s DISASTROUS Flood
item.description:
John Popper is an American musician, songwriter, and the frontman of the rock band Blues Traveler, best known for his powerful harmonica playing and distinctive vocals that helped define the band's blend of blues, rock, and jam music. Rising to fame with hits like "Run-Around" in the 1990s, he has become widely regarded as one of the greatest harmonica players in rock history while maintaining a decades-long touring and recording career. Check out Blues Traveler on tour with The Gin Blossoms and Spin Doctors at bluestraveler.com. 

IN THE NEWS: A massive water main break floods streets in West Hollywood, turning roads into rivers as Los Angeles County firefighters respond, Moment mass brawl breaks out at In-N-Out burger in front of stunned diners, Mamdani housing event features a lady in a mask ranting about her landlord, declaring "eviction = violence", Transgender American regrets fleeing to the Netherlands because all the Muslim migrants want to kill him, Trump reveals plan to replace illegal truckers with military veterans.

FOR MORE WITH JOHN POPPER:

TOUR DATES: (Blues Traveler Co-Headlining W/Gin Blossoms)

  • July 24th-Brookfield Zoo-Chicago
  • July 25th- Gem City Concert Series in Lincoln Park-Quincy, IL
  • July 28th- Bowl In The Pines- Sidney, ME

WEBSITE: bluestraveler.com



FOR MORE WITH MIKE DAWSON:

INSTAGRAM: @dawsangeles

Catch Dawson Saturday July 25th at The Aliante Casino in Las Vegas, NV July 25th w/ Rich Vos, Jim Florentine & Don Jamieson


LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 25 - Huntington Beach, CA
  • July 26 - Torrance, CA (2 Shows)


Thank you for supporting our sponsors:

  • BetOnline
  • oreillyauto.com/adam
  • pluto.tv
  • PodcastOne
  • Quo.com/ADAM


See Privacy Policy at https://art19.com/privacy and California Privacy Notice at https://art19.com/privacy#do-not-sell-my-info.

Rising to fame with hits like "Run-Around" in the 1990s, he has become widely regarded as one of the greatest harmonica players in rock history while maintaining a decades-long touring and recording career. item.content:encoded:
John Popper is an American musician, songwriter, and the frontman of the rock band Blues Traveler, best known for his powerful harmonica playing and distinctive vocals that helped define the band's blend of blues, rock, and jam music. Rising to fame with hits like "Run-Around" in the 1990s, he has become widely regarded as one of the greatest harmonica players in rock history while maintaining a decades-long touring and recording career. Check out Blues Traveler on tour with The Gin Blossoms and Spin Doctors at bluestraveler.com. 

IN THE NEWS: A massive water main break floods streets in West Hollywood, turning roads into rivers as Los Angeles County firefighters respond, Moment mass brawl breaks out at In-N-Out burger in front of stunned diners, Mamdani housing event features a lady in a mask ranting about her landlord, declaring "eviction = violence", Transgender American regrets fleeing to the Netherlands because all the Muslim migrants want to kill him, Trump reveals plan to replace illegal truckers with military veterans.

FOR MORE WITH JOHN POPPER:

TOUR DATES: (Blues Traveler Co-Headlining W/Gin Blossoms)

  • July 24th-Brookfield Zoo-Chicago
  • July 25th- Gem City Concert Series in Lincoln Park-Quincy, IL

item.title: Drea de Matteo Talks Chemtrails, OnlyFans, and Her Father's Mob Ties + Gambling Addiction Goes OVERBOARD
item.description:
Drea de Matteo is an Emmy Award-winning actress best known for her breakout role as Adriana La Cerva on The Sopranos, a performance that earned her the 2004 Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Drama Series. She has since built an acclaimed television career with major roles on Joey, Sons of Anarchy, Desperate Housewives, and Shades of Blue, while also appearing in numerous feature films. Be sure to check out her podcast, Ultrafree.


IN THE NEWS: FanDuel sends a personalized message from Phillies star Bryce Harper to a customer with a gambling addiction. Plus, a flight instructor jumps to his death during a lesson, leaving a student pilot to land the plane on her own.


FOR MORE WITH DREA DE MATTEO:

PODCAST: ULTRAFREE 

  • Out On All Platforms

WEBSITE: ultrafree.co

INSTAGRAM: @DreadeMatteo

FOR MORE WITH ANDREW HOBSON:

YOUTUBE: @andrewfhobson

LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 9 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 10 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 11 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 17 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)
  • July 18 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)


See Privacy Policy at https://art19.com/privacy and California Privacy Notice at https://art19.com/privacy#do-not-sell-my-info.

She has since built an acclaimed television career with major roles on Joey, Sons of Anarchy, Desperate Housewives, and Shades of Blue, while also appearing in numerous feature films. Be sure to check out her podcast, Ultrafree.IN THE NEWS: FanDuel sends a personalized message from Phillies star Bryce Harper to a customer with a gambling addiction. item.content:encoded:
Drea de Matteo is an Emmy Award-winning actress best known for her breakout role as Adriana La Cerva on The Sopranos, a performance that earned her the 2004 Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Drama Series. She has since built an acclaimed television career with major roles on Joey, Sons of Anarchy, Desperate Housewives, and Shades of Blue, while also appearing in numerous feature films. Be sure to check out her podcast, Ultrafree.


IN THE NEWS: FanDuel sends a personalized message from Phillies star Bryce Harper to a customer with a gambling addiction. Plus, a flight instructor jumps to his death during a lesson, leaving a student pilot to land the plane on her own.


FOR MORE WITH DREA DE MATTEO:

  • Out On All Platforms

item.title: Politician Farts and Nudie Suits with Jonathan Kite + Rogan & Vance DESTROY LA Elections & Newsom
item.description:
Jonathan Kite is an American actor, stand-up comedian, and impressionist best known for playing Oleg Golishevsky on the sitcom 2 Broke Girls. He has also built a career through voice acting, television appearances, and live comedy performances, earning recognition for his wide range of celebrity impressions. Check out his website jonathankitecomedy.com for his tour dates. 

IN THE NEWS: Joe Rogan and JD Vance break down the insane LA election and Gavin Newsom’s lies, John Leguizamo says his odyssey in Hollywood has been fighting for Latino representation, Joe Biden announces he has "written a book" about his time as president.

FOR MORE WITH JONATHAN KITE:

DATES: 

  • July 23rd/24/25th-Rosemont, IL-Zanies

WEBSITE: JonathanKiteComedy.com

TWITTER & INSTAGRAM: @JonathanKite

FOR MORE WITH RUDY PAVICH:

WEBSITE: RudyPavichComedy.com

INSTAGRAM: @Rudy_Pavich 

PUNCH UP LIVE: https://punchup.live/rudypavich


LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 17 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)
  • July 18 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)
  • July 25 - Huntington Beach, CA
  • July 26 - Torrance, CA (2 Shows)


Thank you for supporting our sponsors:

  • Protect your family with life insurance from Ethos. Get up to $3 million in coverage in as little as 10 minutes at https://ethos.com/adam . Application times may vary. Rates may vary. Trustpilot rating as of 6/1/2025.
  • HomeServe.com/adam
  • ForThePeople.Com/ADAM
  • SHOPIFY.COM/carolla
  • oreillyauto.com/ADAM
  • Pluto.tv
  • PodcastOne


See Privacy Policy at https://art19.com/privacy and California Privacy Notice at https://art19.com/privacy#do-not-sell-my-info.

He has also built a career through voice acting, television appearances, and live comedy performances, earning recognition for his wide range of celebrity impressions. item.title: Dave Portnoy on the Rise of Anti-semitism and Why He Might Run for Office + California Deploys “Trash Spies”
item.description:
Dave Portnoy is an American entrepreneur, media personality, and founder of Barstool Sports, which he grew from a small Boston sports newspaper into one of the most influential digital sports and entertainment brands in the country. Known for his outspoken personality and viral content, he has also become a prominent figure in sports media, business, and internet culture. Get his new book Cancel Me If You Can out now. 

IN THE NEWS: California deploys "trash spies" to make sure people are sorting their waste properly, Taco Bell Under Investigation Over Explosive Diarrhea Parasite Outbreak, This video from Toronto Police is not an SNL skit. SOMEHOW, IT IS REAL. Some gays are fuming after their gay cruise was denied entry into Turkey & Egypt due to "moral standards." 

FOR MORE WITH DAVE PORTNOY:

BOOK: Cancel Me If You Can

  • Out Now

WEBSITE: barstool.com

item.itunes:title: Dave Portnoy on the Rise of Anti-semitism and Why He Might Run for Office + California Deploys “Trash Spies”
item.itunes:summary:
Dave Portnoy is an American entrepreneur, media personality, and founder of Barstool Sports, which he grew from a small Boston sports newspaper into one of the most influential digital sports and entertainment brands in the country. Known for his outspoken personality and viral content, he has also become a prominent figure in sports media, business, and internet culture. Get his new book Cancel Me If You Can out now. IN THE NEWS: California deploys "trash spies" to make sure people are sorting their waste properly, Taco Bell Under Investigation Over Explosive Diarrhea Parasite Outbreak, This video from Toronto Police is not an SNL skit. SOMEHOW, IT IS REAL. Some gays are fuming after their gay cruise was denied entry into Turkey & Egypt due to "moral standards." FOR MORE WITH DAVE PORTNOY:BOOK: Cancel Me If You CanOut NowWEBSITE: barstool.com FOR MORE WITH ELISHA KRAUSS:WEBSITE: elishakrauss.comYOUTUBE: Elisha Krauss INSTAGRAM: @elishakrauss TWITTER: @elishakrauss LIVE SHOWS: July 17 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)July 18 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)July 25 - Huntington Beach, CAJuly 26 - Torrance, CA (2 Shows)Thank you for supporting our sponsors:BetOnlineLimited Time Offer – Make healthy eating simple. item.content:encoded:
Dave Portnoy is an American entrepreneur, media personality, and founder of Barstool Sports, which he grew from a small Boston sports newspaper into one of the most influential digital sports and entertainment brands in the country. Known for his outspoken personality and viral content, he has also become a prominent figure in sports media, business, and internet culture. Get his new book Cancel Me If You Can out now. 

IN THE NEWS: California deploys "trash spies" to make sure people are sorting their waste properly, Taco Bell Under Investigation Over Explosive Diarrhea Parasite Outbreak, This video from Toronto Police is not an SNL skit. SOMEHOW, IT IS REAL. Some gays are fuming after their gay cruise was denied entry into Turkey & Egypt due to "moral standards." 

FOR MORE WITH DAVE PORTNOY:

BOOK: Cancel Me If You Can

  • Out Now

WEBSITE: barstool.com 

FOR MORE WITH ELISHA KRAUSS:

item.title: Ben Bankas: Trudeau’s An Idiot & Democrats Have No Goals + Anti-ICE Protesters Lose Their Minds
item.description:
Ben Bankas is a Canadian stand-up comedian, podcast host, and political satirist who built his audience with an unapologetically provocative style. He earned widespread attention through viral online clips and independent comedy specials. He also hosts The Bankas Show podcast, where he expands. Known for his politically charged material and outspoken defense of free speech. Check out his new YouTube special, R U MAD?, streaming now on his YouTube channel.

IN THE NEWS: Anti-ICE rioters are STORMING SEN. SUSAN COLLINS' OFFICE in Maine after an ICE agent-involved shooting, when a driver tried ramming them to death, Paramount Reportedly Considering Leaving California as State Readies Lawsuit Over Warner Bros. Discovery Merger — The Hollywood Reporter, Elliot Page is promoting a documentary on the non-binary structure of animals.

FOR MORE WITH BEN BANKAS:

YOUTUBE SPECIAL: R U MAD?

TOUR DATES: 

  • Sept 4th/5th-Hollywood Casino-West Virginia

WEBSITE: benbankas.com

INSTAGRAM: @benbankas2

PODCAST: @bankaspodcast

FOR MORE WITH RUDY PAVICH:

WEBSITE: RudyPavichComedy.com

INSTAGRAM: @Rudy_Pavich 

PUNCH UP LIVE: https://punchup.live/rudypavich

LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 17 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)
  • July 18 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)
  • July 25 - Huntington Beach, CA
  • July 26 - Torrance, CA (2 Shows)

Thank you for supporting our sponsors:

  • BetOnline
  • Hims.com/adam
  • HomeChef.com/ADAM
  • Don’t sleep on [@ultrapouches]. New customers get 15% Off with code carolla at takeultra.com! #UltraPouches #ad
  • oreillyauto.com/ADAM
  • SimpliSafe.com/ADAM
  • Pluto.tv
  • PodcastOne

Ben Bankas is a Canadian stand-up comedian, podcast host, and political satirist who built his audience with an unapologetically provocative style. He earned widespread attention through viral online clips and independent comedy specials. He also hosts The Bankas Show podcast, where he expands. Known for his politically charged material and outspoken defense of free speech. Check out his new YouTube special, R U MAD?, streaming now on his YouTube channel.

item.title: Greg Fitzsimmons Talks Dildos, Bathrobes, and Old Man Boners + Biohacker Bryan Johnson Has Incurable Disease
item.description:
Greg Fitzsimmons is a stand-up comedian, Emmy-winning television writer, and podcast host who has built a career spanning comedy clubs, late-night television, radio, and podcasting over more than three decades. He has written for shows including The Ellen DeGeneres Show and Lucky Louie, won multiple Daytime Emmy Awards, and is also known for hosting the long-running Fitzdog Radio podcast and frequent appearances on The Howard Stern Show and podcasts across the comedy world. Check out his live dates to see him on the road at gregfitzsimmons.com. 


IN THE NEWS: Biohacker Bryan Johnson reveals he has incurable disease: ‘My stomach is eating itself, White House says National Museum of American History found room for drag queens and crotch harnesses, but not the Founding Fathers, Bay Area restaurant fines parents after rowdy kids trash the place — and the internet is loving it, Christopher Nolan faces growing backlash over 'Odyssey' casting, historical accuracy as screenings canceled


FOR MORE WITH FITZDOG:


LIVE DATES:

  • 7/11-Levity Live-Oxnard
  • 7/12-Huntington Beach- Mamba
  • 7/24-25-Improv-Pittsburgh

WEBSITE: FITZDOG.com

PODCASTS: ‘Fitzdog Radio’ & ‘Sunday Papers’

  • Available wherever you listen to podcasts 

TWITTER: @GregFitzShow



FOR MORE WITH MIKE DAWSON:

INSTAGRAM: @dawsangeles


LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 9 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 10 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 11 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 17 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)
  • July 18 - Austin, TX (2 Shows)


Thank you for supporting our sponsors:

  • Go to https://hometitlelock.com/adamcarolla and use promo code ADAM to get a FREE title history report and a FREE TRIAL of their Triple Lock Protection! For details visit https://hometitlelock.com/warranty
  • ForThePeople.Com/ADAM
  • oreillyauto.com/ADAM
  • Pluto.tv
  • PodcastOne
  • Quince.com/acs

item.content:encoded:
Greg Fitzsimmons is a stand-up comedian, Emmy-winning television writer, and podcast host who has built a career spanning comedy clubs, late-night television, radio, and podcasting over more than three decades. He has written for shows including The Ellen DeGeneres Show and Lucky Louie, won multiple Daytime Emmy Awards, and is also known for hosting the long-running Fitzdog Radio podcast and frequent appearances on The Howard Stern Show and podcasts across the comedy world. Check out his live dates to see him on the road at gregfitzsimmons.com. 


IN THE NEWS: Biohacker Bryan Johnson reveals he has incurable disease: ‘My stomach is eating itself, White House says National Museum of American History found room for drag queens and crotch harnesses, but not the Founding Fathers, Bay Area restaurant fines parents after rowdy kids trash the place — and the internet is loving it, Christopher Nolan faces growing backlash over 'Odyssey' casting, historical accuracy as screenings canceled

item.title: Adam Ray on Norm Macdonald, Funny Movies & 2 Girls 1 Cup + The Odyssey Press Tour JUST GOT WORSE!
item.description:
Adam Ray is an American stand-up comedian, actor, writer, and podcaster who built his career through roles in television and film, frequent appearances on comedy podcasts, and years as a touring headliner. In recent years, he's become one of comedy's biggest breakout successes thanks to his wildly popular character work—especially his portrayal of "Dr. Phil"—which has generated millions of online views, sold-out live shows, and a hit podcast series. Check out his new podcast “The Adam Ray Show,” now out on Netflix. 

IN THE NEWS:  Kenyan “Helen of Troy” actress slams Homer for ignoring “female perspective” in the legendary war her character caused, British health secretary reverses course, says women can't have penises, Leading DSA Candidate To Replace Platner Accused Of Hitting Female Colleague During Argument, Manhattan high-rise evacuated as officials warn of potential collapse.

FOR MORE WITH ADAM RAY:

VIDEO PODCAST: The Adam Ray Show

  • Out Now On Netflix

TOUR: “Who Is Me”

  • Hard Rock Cafe, Orlando FL- July 24th
  • The Parker- Fort Lauderdale, FL- July 25th
  • Seminole Hard Rock Hotel-Tampa, FL-July 26th
  • San Jose Improv- San Jose, CA - July 31st

WEBSITE: AdamRayComedy.com

INSTAGRAM & TWITTER: @AdamRayComedy 

FOR MORE WITH ELISHA KRAUSS:

WEBSITE:  elishakrauss.com

YOUTUBE: Elisha Krauss

INSTAGRAM: @elishakrauss  

TWITTER: @elishakrauss  

LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 9 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 10 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 11 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)


Thank you for supporting our sponsors:

  • Buylarine.com/ADAM
  • BetOnline
  • Pluto.tv
  • PodcastOne
  • oreillyauto.com/ADAM
  • SHOPIFY.COM/carolla
  • Sheath. The underwear of legends. Go to https://www.sheath.com/ADAM and use code ADAMfor 20% off.


See Privacy Policy at https://art19.com/privacy and California Privacy Notice at https://art19.com/privacy#do-not-sell-my-info.

In recent years, he's become one of comedy's biggest breakout successes thanks to his wildly popular character work—especially his portrayal of "Dr. Phil"—which has generated millions of online views, sold-out live shows, and a hit podcast series. Adam Ray is an American stand-up comedian, actor, writer, and podcaster who built his career through roles in television and film, frequent appearances on comedy podcasts, and years as a touring headliner. In recent years, he's become one of comedy's biggest breakout successes thanks to his wildly popular character work—especially his portrayal of "Dr. Phil"—which has generated millions of online views, sold-out live shows, and a hit podcast series. Check out his new podcast “The Adam Ray Show,” now out on Netflix. 

IN THE NEWS:  Kenyan “Helen of Troy” actress slams Homer for ignoring “female perspective” in the legendary war her character caused, British health secretary reverses course, says women can't have penises, Leading DSA Candidate To Replace Platner Accused Of Hitting Female Colleague During Argument, Manhattan high-rise evacuated as officials warn of potential collapse.

item.title: Michael Waddell: It’s Okay To Be A Man + Jasmine Crockett “America Owes Black Women Everything”
item.description:
Michael Waddell rose to prominence as a champion turkey caller before becoming one of the most recognizable personalities in outdoor television through his long-running hunting series Bone Collector. He has built a successful career as a television host, author, podcaster, and entrepreneur, helping popularize ethical hunting and conservation while creating one of the outdoor industry's most influential media brands. Check out his podcast ‘The Michael Waddell Podcast’ coming to SiriusXM soon and his show The Bone Collector streaming on OutdoorTV. 


IN THE NEWS:  America owes black women 'everything,' Rep. Jasmine Crockett rants over July 4 weekend, California gives 136 acres of scenic beachfront property to native tribes, Four people shot in east Los Angeles following Mexico-England World Cup match: cops, Teacher and Left-Wing Activist Should ‘Expect To Be Prosecuted’ For Green Card Marriage To Gaza Man 


FOR MORE WITH MICHAEL WADDELL:

WEBSITE: bonecollector.com

PODCAST: The Michael Waddell Podcast


FOR MORE WITH ADAM YENSER:

YOUTUBE SHOW: The Cancelled News

INSTAGRAM: @adamyenser  

TWITTER: @cleancomedian69


LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 9 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 10 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 11 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)

  • BetOnline

item.itunes:title: Michael Waddell: It’s Okay To Be A Man + Jasmine Crockett “America Owes Black Women Everything”
item.itunes:summary:
Michael Waddell rose to prominence as a champion turkey caller before becoming one of the most recognizable personalities in outdoor television through his long-running hunting series Bone Collector. He has built a successful career as a television host, author, podcaster, and entrepreneur, helping popularize ethical hunting and conservation while creating one of the outdoor industry's most influential media brands. Check out his podcast ‘The Michael Waddell Podcast’ coming to SiriusXM soon and his show The Bone Collector streaming on OutdoorTV. IN THE NEWS: America owes black women 'everything,' Rep. Jasmine Crockett rants over July 4 weekend, California gives 136 acres of scenic beachfront property to native tribes, Four people shot in east Los Angeles following Mexico-England World Cup match: cops, Teacher and Left-Wing Activist Should ‘Expect To Be Prosecuted’ For Green Card Marriage To Gaza Man FOR MORE WITH MICHAEL WADDELL:WEBSITE: bonecollector.comPODCAST: The Michael Waddell PodcastFOR MORE WITH ADAM YENSER:YOUTUBE SHOW: The Cancelled NewsINSTAGRAM: @adamyenser TWITTER: @cleancomedian69LIVE SHOWS: July 9 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)July 10 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)July 11 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)Thank you for supporting our sponsors:BetOnlinebetterhelp.com/carollaoreillyauto.com/ADAMSimpliSafe.com/ADAMPluto.tvPodcastOne

item.content:encoded:
Michael Waddell rose to prominence as a champion turkey caller before becoming one of the most recognizable personalities in outdoor television through his long-running hunting series Bone Collector. He has built a successful career as a television host, author, podcaster, and entrepreneur, helping popularize ethical hunting and conservation while creating one of the outdoor industry's most influential media brands. Check out his podcast ‘The Michael Waddell Podcast’ coming to SiriusXM soon and his show The Bone Collector streaming on OutdoorTV. 


IN THE NEWS:  America owes black women 'everything,' Rep. Jasmine Crockett rants over July 4 weekend, California gives 136 acres of scenic beachfront property to native tribes, Four people shot in east Los Angeles following Mexico-England World Cup match: cops, Teacher and Left-Wing Activist Should ‘Expect To Be Prosecuted’ For Green Card Marriage To Gaza Man 


FOR MORE WITH MICHAEL WADDELL:

WEBSITE: bonecollector.com

PODCAST: The Michael Waddell Podcast


FOR MORE WITH ADAM YENSER:

YOUTUBE SHOW: The Cancelled News

INSTAGRAM: @adamyenser  

TWITTER: @cleancomedian69


LIVE SHOWS: 

  • July 9 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 10 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)
  • July 11 - Las Vegas, NV (2 Shows)


Thank you for supporting our sponsors:

  • BetOnline
  • betterhelp.com/carolla
